parameters.content:
## onchain-snapshotter (hourly)
Schedule -> PE status + PE shielded (platform-explorer) -> ZecHub shielded/total -> Zcash tip (blockchair) -> Normalize -> 2 writes.

TWO CLOCKS (DB-SCHEMA S1/S8):
- dash-platform (8 metrics): hourly state, ts=fetch, height=PE block -> Write snapshots (INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING).
- zec_block_height (blockchair): hourly chain-tip, ts=block time, height=the height -> Write snapshots.
- zec supply (ZecHub, 2 metrics): DAILY date-keyed aggregate, ts=close-date UTC midnight, height NULL, revisable -> Upsert zec supply (DO UPDATE).

value_raw = EXACT string; base64-bound $1 param (no SQLi). Owner: onchain-intel.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO onchain.snapshots (ts, ts_bucket, source, asset, metric, value_raw, value_num, height, raw_json, created_at)
SELECT ts, ts_bucket, source, asset, metric, value_raw, value_num, height, raw_json, created_at
FROM jsonb_to_recordset(convert_from(decode($1, 'base64'), 'utf8')::jsonb)
  AS x(ts bigint, ts_bucket bigint, source text, asset text, metric text, value_raw text, value_num double precision, height bigint, raw_json text, created_at bigint)
ON CONFLICT (source, asset, metric, ts_bucket) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO onchain.snapshots (ts, ts_bucket, source, asset, metric, value_raw, value_num, height, raw_json, created_at)
SELECT ts, ts_bucket, source, asset, metric, value_raw, value_num, height, raw_json, created_at
FROM jsonb_to_recordset(convert_from(decode($1, 'base64'), 'utf8')::jsonb)
  AS x(ts bigint, ts_bucket bigint, source text, asset text, metric text, value_raw text, value_num double precision, height bigint, raw_json text, created_at bigint)
ON CONFLICT (source, asset, metric, ts_bucket) DO UPDATE
  SET value_raw = EXCLUDED.value_raw, value_num = EXCLUDED.value_num, raw_json = EXCLUDED.raw_json, created_at = EXCLUDED.created_at;
